title: Kids Placement Test
description: Foundation grammar and vocabulary test for young learners.
instructions: Questions are designed for younger learners and basic grammar awareness.
No points are deducted for incorrect answers.
After moving to the next question, you cannot return.

questions.prompt: What's your name?
I ___ from Uzbekistan.
They ___ doctors.
There ___ a cat on the chair.
She ___ play the piano very well.
We ___ TV every evening.
What time ___ you go to school?
There are two ___ in the box.
I have got two ___ brothers.
___ you like ice cream?
My father ___ work on Sundays.
I have ___ books in my bag.
This is my mother. ___ name is Sara.
My mother is a ___. She works in a hospital.
Can you tell me the way to the post office?
options: Yes, go straight and turn left.

questions.prompt: We ___ to the park yesterday.
There isn't ___ milk in the fridge.
I ___ breakfast at 7 o'clock.
She ___ like coffee.
We usually go to school ___ bus.
I was very tired, so I ___ to bed early.
There were ___ people at the party.
I don't have ___ friends in my new class.
The synonym of angry is ___.
Yesterday, it ___ very hot.
I think it ___ rain tomorrow.
She's ___ to buy a new dress.
This movie is ___ than the last one.
I have never ___ sushi before.
Choose the best reply: I'm really tired today.
options: You should go to bed early.
